ab: mo mai pitu ne mi’o uhne ’oyonatmopsʉ.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: ahoi tmopsʉ, yʉmeʉmʉ to ’oyomia tmopsʉ ’o lema’cohio, mainca ’o letaayaezoi, “yac’ʉ! m’ohkuyu!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: mo seolʉa no tmopsʉ, isi pa’cohivi to lema’cohi tala hia tmasvʉtʉ no buacou.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Cou language of numbers.

ab: mimza tmu’ofehni to lema’cohio ho engha, mimza pasu tmasvʉtʉ.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: mo man’i ’o os’o pelʉi ci h’oe’ea cou.
en: I have learned many Cou languages.

ab: la’u huhucmasi uhne ’oyona tmopsʉ, la’u huhucmasi aʉsvʉtʉ buacou, te’ola esvʉtneni to ino’u.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Cou language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
